name: rolepod
description: 18-agent dev team workflow with simplicity gates, test gates, and verify-first discipline. Native Codex plugin: agents, skills, and hooks.

interface.shortDescription: 18-agent dev team with gates and verify-first discipline.
interface.longDescription: Rolepod gives Codex an 18-specialist dev team (engineering, quality, design, ops, strategy) plus simplicity / test / triage gates that fire before every commit. Native Codex plugin — agents, skills, and hooks all wire into Codex primitives, no wrapper required.
defaultPrompt: Use rolepod gates before every commit: S1-S5 simplicity, T1-T6 tests, Q1-Q4 triage, F1-F5 failure-mode.
